overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a cozy underground cave dwelling interior decorated for winter, featuring a lit stone fireplace, decorated Christmas tree, and warm ambient lighting from a stained-glass lamp. The scene is rendered in a game engine with high-quality lighting and textures, creating an atmospheric, intimate atmosphere.

rough-hewn stone walls and arched cave ceiling with hanging plants
dried plants or grasses in the immediate foreground

segments.scene_description: A static view of a cozy, dimly lit cave interior converted into a living space. A decorated Christmas tree stands to the right while a warm fire burns in the stone fireplace at the center back. A stained-glass floor lamp provides additional warm lighting on the left. The stone walls and ceiling are adorned with hanging plants, creating an intimate winter atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, intimate view of a cozy underground cave dwelling meticulously decorated for the winter season. It begins by capturing the dimly lit interior where a warm fire burns steadily within a central stone fireplace. As the eye wanders through the space, the warm glow expands from a stained-glass floor lamp on the left to a brightly decorated Christmas tree on the right. The scene finally settles on the surrounding stone walls and ceiling, which are softened by the presence of hanging plants that complete the atmospheric living space.
